titleStmt.title: SII 9.195: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 195. (A.R. No. 122 of 1913.) ON A SLAB SET UP AT THE ENTRANCE TO THE NARASIMHASVAMI TEMPLE AT RANGAPURAM, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 41, Durmakha, Pushya, śu. (Śu. appears to be a mistake for ba.) 3, Ādityavāra, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti corresponding to A.D. 1116 December 24 Sunday. It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva. While his queen Padmaladēvi was ruling over the agrahāra Māṅgoḷa, the warlike, religious and learned Mahājanas of the place, 200 in number, are said to have been enjoying the benefits of her rule. At the request of the Mahājanas, the queen ordered Puḷiyama-Nāyaka to make a gift of 11 mattars of land for the service of the god Narasiṅghadēva. The 120 Mahājanas of Bidirapaḷḷi made a grant of gadyāṇas 25 for the service of the same god. Ichchiya-Nāyaka, son of Sōmēśvarabhaṭṭa and his brother Baladēva-Ghaisāsa made a grant of land for the service of the same god. Again on Māgha śu. 5, Ādityavāra of the cyclic year Yuva (probably = A.D. 1155, January 5, Sunday) the Mahājanas with Heggaḍe Liṅgayya at their head, exempted the five Tōṭigas from taxes. This seems to be a later addition.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīkriṣṇāya namaḥ . jayatyāviṣkritaṁ viṣṇōrvvārāhaṁ kṣōbhitārṇna
vaṁ dakṣiṇō(ṁ)nnatadamṣṭrāgra(ṁ)viśrāṁtabhuvanaṁ vapuḥ .
svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirāja
paramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrī
mattribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddha
mānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire . svastiyanavarataparamaka
lyāṇābhyudayasahasraphaḷabhōgabhāginī dvitīyalakṣmīsamāne kaḷahaṁsayā
ne Agaṇyapuṇyalāvaṇyalīlālaṁkrita parivārakalpalate Artthijanaciṁtāma
ṇi gōtracūḍāmaṇi pratyakṣapārvvati patibratāruṁdhati Abhinavasarasvati rū
pavidyādhari sakaḷakaḷādhari mahālakṣmīdēvīlabdhavaraprasāde dānavinōde
śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvaviśāḷavakṣasthaḷanivāsiniyarappa śrīma
tu padmaladēviyaru Agrahāraṁ māṁgoḷamaṁ sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁdāḷutta
mire . svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭānajapasamādhi
śīlaṣaṭkarmmakriyānirataranēkayajñāvabhritāvagāhanapavitrīkritaśarī
rarvvēdavēdāṁgōpāṁganēkaśāstrāṣṭādaśadharmmasaṁhitaru caturddaśavidyāpāra
garāśritajanakaḷpadrumarasaṁkhyātaguṇagaṇāḷaṁkritarssatyavākyaru śara
ṇāgatavajrapaṁjararu śrītuṁgabhadrādēviya dakṣiṇataṭōttaraśrīnāra
siṅghadēvapādārādhakarappa śrīmanmahāgrahāraṁ māṁgoḷadūroḍeya
pramukhamahājanavinnūrvvaruṁ Aikamatyadiṁ duṣṭanigrahaśiṣṭapratipā
ḷanadiṁdanubhavisuttamire . svasti śrīmaccāḷukyavikramakālada 41 ne
ya durmmakhisaṁvatsarada puṣya suddha 3 Ādityavāra Uttarāyaṇasaṁkrā
ntiyaṁdu śrīmadūroḍeyapramukhamahājanani(ṁ)nnūrvvaru śrīmatpadmala
dēviyargge binnapaṁgeyyalā binnapakkarasiyaru kāruṇyaṁgeydu śri nāra
siṅghadēvargge snānanivēdyakkaṁ Aṁgabhōgakkaṁ naḍeva(ṁ)ntappa bhūmiyaṁ sa
rvvabādhāparihāramāgi biṭṭenenalu Ā kāruṇyavacanamaninnūrvvaru
paḍeyalu śrīnārasiṅghadēvargge puḷiyamanāyakaru biṭṭa dēva
ra mūḍaṇa pāḷakeyi maḷi savaḍipuṇisaya maṇalakeyi
ma 7 Āntu mattaru 11 . bidirapaḷḷiya Ūraḍeyapramukhamahā
janaṁ nūṟairppadiṁbargge poṁge Irppaṇa vriddhiyalu koṭṭa gadyāṇa 25
sōmēsvarabhaṭṭara magaṁ Iciyanāyakaruṁ Avaraṇna baladēvaghaisāsaru biṭṭa
baḷgalalliya keṁgāḍu ma 2 cikkagavuṁḍageṟeyoḷage maṇalakeyi ma 3 māni ma 1
Aṁbiyagoḷadalli ma 1 Antu ma 7 I dharmmamaninnūrvvaruṁ pratipāḷisuvaru
I dharmmamanāvanāgiyuṁ kādu rakṣisidāta prayāgevāraṇāsigurukṣētra
varghyatīrtthadalu sāsirvvarvvēdapāragarappa brāhmaṇarige sāsira kavileya kōḍuṁ
koḷaguma paṁcaratnadi kaṭṭisi yubhayamukhigoṭṭa mahāpuruṣanakku .
Ī dharmmamanaḷidātaṁ prayāgevāraṇāsigurukṣētradalu sāsirvvarvvēda(vēda)
pāragarappa brāhmaṇarumaṁ sāsira kavileyma koṁda mahāpātakanakku .
svadataṁ paradataṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭi rvvarṣasayaśrāṇi mriṣṭā
yāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . yuvasaṁvatsarada māgha suddha paṁcami Ādi
tyavāradaṁdu śrīnarasiṅghadēvara kaṁmaradoḷeraḍu tōṭagaru mū
varu Antu 5 vargga teṟe sarbbābādhaparihāravāgi heggaḍe liṁgayya
pramakhavāgi Aśēṣamahājanavinnūrbbaru mānyamaṁ biṭṭaru .
Digital edition of SII 9.195 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
